channel.title: post on Fundor333
channel.description: Recent content in post on Fundor333

item.title: Keep update Gitlab
item.description: Some time ago I had a problem with a selfhosted Gitlab instances. I had a new user, johnyj12345, which create a repo and an issiue and log off. This is an attack made to my instance because I don’t upgraded it for some time so I cleanit and remove all the trace of this user and update all.1 After this I was ready to tacle the elephant in the room: how to check if my self hosted GitLab.
